card_description: Ikhnoton is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick formally introduces the name "Zebra" for the mimicking, tutelary entity that camouflages itself as the phenomenal world."

linked_segments.summary: Dick formally introduces the name "Zebra" for the mimicking, tutelary entity that camouflages itself as the phenomenal world. He defines Zebra as the "Deus Absconditus" (Shy God) who arranges causal c
